note: Two fixes. (1) Address detail double-count fix: lottery payouts are coinbase outputs, so they were being counted in MINED AND shown again in DTD LOTTERY RECEIVED — making MINED + RECEIVED + LOTTERY > TOTAL BALANCE. Now lottery is subtracted from MINED so the three rows sum to TOTAL exactly. SPENDABLE / IMMATURE unchanged because lottery UTXOs share the coinbase maturity rule. Tooltips updated to clarify the breakdown. (2) DIFF HISTORY chart: blocks where Slingshot fired (gate 1 prev_elapsed > 1800s + gate 2 current_elapsed > 600s + height >= 7000) now render as magenta dots with a halo instead of the default purple. Counter at the right of the strip shows total Slingshot fires in the visible 288-block window. v124 Slingshot indicator panel preserved. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
